reviews.review_title: So then I just start blastin

reviews.review_description: Does not work. Lets me into saloon and tutorial but that's it. Cant get into any of the towns.

Bought 1 for myself and another as a gift...
But mine doesn't work 🤷🏻‍♂️
Let's me into the saloon but that's it unless am missing something?
No error warning ⚠️
Tried uninstall and on again same can move my hands but no buttons working 🤔
Fps was sitting down never even seen the guns My Bad...
Looks and feels excellent will change my rate now 👍

developer_response.body: We are shooting at the start sign with the pistols on our waist :) We will make an update to make it more understandable. Thank you.

reviews.review_description: I just bought this game today and I love it.

I know that this is still the pioneer days of VR. The room for improvement is vast. Cowboy Rush is a opulent title set in the blazing West. It's a bare bones minimalist set up. No HUDs, no mods. No upgrades, no easy, medium and difficult setting. This game would be a younger sibling to Guns & Stories which is the premium champagne grade Western shooter.
For the money it's worth it but the gameplay is set to difficult on efery level after level one and even then level one is medium setting. There is no easy setting on this game.
Good luck getting past Town II. Enemies appear five at a time. There are about ten towns if your are sheer lucky enough to complete it.
Even after asking for a refund and getting it and then deciding to repurchase it again for sentimental reasons, as this truly is a wonderful and charming VR game, when I reinstalled it, the game remembered my previous progress which didn't get lost at all.

I hope that the developers revisit this app and tweak it here and there. And an HUD which includes a incremental meter displaying health reacquire after drinking the heal bottle. Include mods and upgrades. The game as it is offers no indication. If the game is upgraded as an add on DLC, I would be willing to pay money for that. 
That's how the West was won.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your valuable feedback. At Ziga Games, we listen to your criticisms and will continue to improve and enhance the game.

reviews.review_description: So I’ve never really wrote a review but this is just to say I love this game and I have a few suggestions, maybe add gore and euphoria ragdolls? And there is a bug where when you do the newer levels they don’t register as completed in the main menu.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your nice comment. We are working on new updates. We will also look into what you mentioned. Have a good game!

reviews.review_description: Nice shooting game with slow motion effects
This game offers a fantastic VR experience that keeps you engaged without feeling intrusive, delivering more of a fun arcade experience rather than a simulation.
A game full of fun with its atmosphere and enemies :)
exciting shooter, immerses me well in the atmosphere of the wild west, I really feel like a sheriff/cowboy fighting criminals in the cities 😎👮🏻‍♂️
